[linux/build]   |    - add LIBDIR to the 'LD_RUN_PATH' environment variable
[linux/build]   |      during linking
[linux/build]   |    - use the '-Wl,-rpath -Wl,LIBDIR' linker flag
[linux/build]   |    - have your system administrator add LIBDIR to '/etc/ld.so.conf'
[linux/build]   | 
[linux/build]   | See any operating system documentation about shared libraries for
[linux/build]   | more information, such as the ld(1) and ld.so(8) manual pages.
